'''Lagan Ismaren''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

==Biography==
One of the few [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] to survive the [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Lagan and his younger sister [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda]] hid with the [[Children of the Jedi]] in [[Plett's Well|Plawal]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], where Lagan was a childhood companion of [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]]. After being forced to flee Belsavis, Lagan and Roganda were separated from their parents and brought before [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Ameesa Darys]]. Darys skewered Lagan on her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before Roganda's eyes.

==Appearances==
